mapper.sql: id, plan_code, plan_name, plan_type, description, max_user_count, max_storage_mb, status, sort_no, version, delete_marker, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.select:
select
distinct
,
from sys_tenant_plan
order by ${orderByClause}

select
distinct
from sys_tenant_plan
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_tenant_plan (id, plan_code, plan_name, plan_type, description, max_user_count, max_storage_mb, status, sort_no, version, delete_marker, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, feature_policy) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{planCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{planType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{maxUserCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{maxStorageMb,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{featurePolicy,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR})

insert into sys_tenant_plan
id,
plan_code,
plan_name,
plan_type,
description,
max_user_count,
max_storage_mb,
status,
sort_no,
version,
delete_marker,
create_by,
create_time,
update_by,
update_time,
feature_policy,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{planCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{planName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{planType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{maxUserCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{maxStorageMb,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{featurePolicy,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update sys_tenant_plan
id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
plan_code = #{row.planCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
plan_name = #{row.planName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
plan_type = #{row.planType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{row.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
max_user_count = #{row.maxUserCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
max_storage_mb = #{row.maxStorageMb,jdbcType=BIGINT},
status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sort_no = #{row.sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
version = #{row.version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delete_marker = #{row.deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
feature_policy = #{row.featurePolicy,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

update sys_tenant_plan set id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, plan_code = #{row.planCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, plan_name = #{row.planName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, plan_type = #{row.planType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{row.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, max_user_count = #{row.maxUserCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, max_storage_mb = #{row.maxStorageMb,jdbcType=BIGINT}, status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort_no = #{row.sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, version = #{row.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delete_marker = #{row.deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, feature_policy = #{row.featurePolicy,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}

update sys_tenant_plan set id = #{row.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, plan_code = #{row.planCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, plan_name = #{row.planName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, plan_type = #{row.planType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{row.description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, max_user_count = #{row.maxUserCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, max_storage_mb = #{row.maxStorageMb,jdbcType=BIGINT}, status = #{row.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort_no = #{row.sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, version = #{row.version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delete_marker = #{row.deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_by = #{row.createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{row.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{row.updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{row.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update sys_tenant_plan
plan_code = #{planCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
plan_name = #{planName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
plan_type = #{planType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
max_user_count = #{maxUserCount,jdbcType=INTEGER},
max_storage_mb = #{maxStorageMb,jdbcType=BIGINT},
status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sort_no = #{sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER},
version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER},
delete_marker = #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
feature_policy = #{featurePolicy,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update sys_tenant_plan set plan_code = #{planCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, plan_name = #{planName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, plan_type = #{planType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, max_user_count = #{maxUserCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, max_storage_mb = #{maxStorageMb,jdbcType=BIGINT}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort_no = #{sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delete_marker = #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, feature_policy = #{featurePolicy,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update sys_tenant_plan set plan_code = #{planCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, plan_name = #{planName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, plan_type = #{planType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, description = #{description,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, max_user_count = #{maxUserCount,jdbcType=INTEGER}, max_storage_mb = #{maxStorageMb,jdbcType=BIGINT}, status = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sort_no = #{sortNo,jdbcType=INTEGER}, version = #{version,jdbcType=INTEGER}, delete_marker = #{deleteMarker,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
